reason: Current backend spec still defines this repo as a Python hook with file-only state; implementation must intentionally change that boundary.
Persistence guidance currently forbids databases; use it as the baseline contract that this task will revise.
Current frontend spec says there is no browser UI; the local analytics viewer needs an explicit surface expansion.
This feature adds a payload-to-SQLite-to-HTTP-to-browser flow that needs explicit shared contracts.
The archived auto-recovery design is the behavior baseline the JS rewrite must preserve while adding analytics.
